title: Amauropelta sanctiformis
taxonomy: Amauropelta sanctiformis belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the marsh ferns. This plant is a member of the genus Amauropelta. Amauropelta sanctiformis is native to South America and is part of the pteridophyte division, which includes all ferns and fern allies. The classification of Amauropelta sanctiformis further breaks down into the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The family Thelypteridaceae is also known as the wood fern family.
